news.description: The Indian rupee's upward surge encounters some obstacles. news.title: Japan's Nikkei gauge crosses 71,000 on US-Iran peace deal
news.description: Japan's Nikkei share index soared to a historic 71,000 level on Thursday. This surge followed a ceasefire agreement between the U.S. and Iran. news.title: Booked losses in stocks or mutual funds? Why filing ITR may still be important
news.description: For investors, a loss-making year does not necessarily eliminate the need to file an ITR. In many cases, filing the return within the due date can preserve an important tax benefit by allowing losses to be carried forward and adjusted against future gains.

news.title: U.S. held back blacklisting DeepSeek, over 100 Chinese firms despite security concerns, sources say
news.description: America has delayed adding over 100 Chinese firms, including AI startup DeepSeek and chipmaker CXMT, to a trade blacklist. These companies were flagged for national security risks. The US aims to prevent further escalation of tensions with Beijing.
